docstrings.CoreStats: A class to collect core statistics such as start time, finish time, and counts of items scraped or dropped.
docstrings.CoreStats.from_crawler: Create a CoreStats instance from the crawler, connecting necessary signals.
docstrings.CoreStats.item_dropped: Increment the count of items dropped by the spider and record the exception type.
docstrings.CoreStats.item_dropped_reasons_count: Increment the count of items dropped by the spider and record the exception type.
docstrings.CoreStats.item_scraped: Increment the count of items scraped by the spider.
docstrings.CoreStats.item_scraped_count: Increment the count of items scraped by the spider.
docstrings.CoreStats.response_received: Increment the count of responses received by the spider.
docstrings.CoreStats.response_received_count: Increment the count of responses received by the spider.
docstrings.CoreStats.spider_closed: Record the finish time and reason when the spider is closed.
docstrings.CoreStats.spider_opened: Record the start time when the spider is opened.
